items.description: Multi vehicle crash on I-476 southbound between 1 miles SOUTH of Exit 16: I-76 - PHILADELPHIA/VALLEY FORGE/CONSHOHOKEN and Exit 13: US 30 - ST DAVIDS/VILLANOVA. There is a lane restriction.
